name: 17th Century
bio: The founding era of Kuvala, when the village was established by early settlers.

name: Founder Chief
bio: The legendary founder who established Kuvala and built the first temple.

name: Original Shiva Temple
bio: The first structure built in Kuvala, dedicated to Lord Shiva.

name: Elder Chieftain
bio: Son of the Founder Chief who expanded the village's boundaries.

name: Great Migration
bio: A significant migration event that brought artisans and farmers to Kuvala.

name: 19th Century
bio: A period of growth and establishment of community institutions in Kuvala.

name: Trustee Maheshbhai
bio: Established the Panjrapole and the Chabutro in service of animals and birds.

name: Chabutro (Bird Tower)
bio: The iconic bird-feeding tower standing at the heart of Kuvala village.

name: Panjrapole
bio: A shelter providing care and refuge for cows and other animals.

name: Modern Era
bio: The current era of Kuvala, preserving heritage while embracing modernity.
